description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized banana with a smooth, slightly matte yellow peel and a gentle, natural curvature. The banana's surface is mostly uniform in color, with subtle gradients of yellow and a few faint brownish marks near the stem and tip, indicating minor handling or natural imperfections. The stem is intact, slightly brown, and appears firm, while the tip is rounded and shows no signs of splitting or tearing. The banana's body is plump and evenly shaped, with no visible bruises, deep blemishes, or significant deformities. The peel texture appears semi-soft, with a slight waxy sheen but no glossiness. There are no commercial stickers, labels, or foreign objects attached to the peel.
description: A medium-sized, gently curved yellow banana with a smooth, matte peel and minor natural imperfections. The stem is intact and slightly brown, with no visible stickers or major blemishes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and curvature of the banana, with the stem on the right and the tip on the left.
description_view_1: End-on view from the tip, revealing the rounded end and the banana's width, with the stem not visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the banana's full curve with the stem on the left and the tip on the right.
description_view_3: End-on view from the stem, showing the cut stem and the banana's width, with the tip not visible.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is intact and smooth, with only minor natural marks and no visible tears, splits, or significant blemishes. The surface texture appears even and undamaged.
